item.title: TouchDesigner Workshop Series with @co.une and @opikqurrahman Day 1 — Beginner (...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@97kobo.lab

TouchDesigner Workshop Series
with @co.une and @opikqurrahman

Day 1 — Beginner (First Timer)

FRI, 3 APR 2026 | 16:30 – 18:30 | IDR 249K

Intro to TouchDesigner

Get familiar with the environment and core workflows for real-time visual FX.

You’ll explore:
• Basic TOP processing
• Audio analysis
• Generative geometry (TOP & 3D objects)
• Common real-time camera FX

⸻

Day 2 — Intermediate

SAT, 4 APR 2026 | 13:00 – 15:30 | IDR 325K

Hardware Integration & Mapping

Bring your visuals into the physical world through lighting, projection, and data protocols.

You’ll explore:
• Art-Net (DMX integration)
• LED / pixel mapping
• Advanced projection mapping
• Data communication (NDI, OSC, MIDI, Art-Net)

⸻

Day 3 — Intermediate → Advanced

SUN, 5 APR 2026 | 13:00 – 15:30 | IDR 375K

Particle Systems & High-Performance Visuals

Build efficient, high-quality particle systems using POP operators.

You’ll explore:
• Gaussian splatting workflows
• Audio-reactive particle systems

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (5 medier)

@97kobo.lab

TouchDesigner Workshop Series
with @co.une and @opikqurrahman

Day 1 — Beginner (First Timer)

FRI, 3 APR 2026 | 16:30 – 18:30 | IDR 249K

Intro to TouchDesigner

Get familiar with the environment and core workflows for real-time visual FX.

You’ll explore:
• Basic TOP processing
• Audio analysis
• Generative geometry (TOP & 3D objects)
• Common real-time camera FX

⸻

Day 2 — Intermediate

SAT, 4 APR 2026 | 13:00 – 15:30 | IDR 325K

Hardware Integration & Mapping

Bring your visuals into the physical world through lighting, projection, and data protocols.

You’ll explore:
• Art-Net (DMX integration)
• LED / pixel mapping
• Advanced projection mapping
• Data communication (NDI, OSC, MIDI, Art-Net)

⸻

Day 3 — Intermediate → Advanced

SUN, 5 APR 2026 | 13:00 – 15:30 | IDR 375K

Particle Systems & High-Performance Visuals

Build efficient, high-quality particle systems using POP operators.

You’ll explore:
• Gaussian splatting workflows
• Audio-reactive particle systems

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.author: 97kobo.lab

item.title: Saturday 11.04.2026 13:00-16:00 @97kobo.lab Bring your laptop + ableton live REG...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (3 medier)

@97kobo.lab

Saturday 11.04.2026 13:00-16:00 @97kobo.lab
Bring your laptop + ableton live
REGISTRATION LINK IN BIO or DM/WA: 0851-7158-8508

In this workshop, berlin-based musician, producer, sound designer and university lecturer, Björn Tillmann (BAERK.), shares his personal approach to sound design: an exploration of the boundaries between organic texture, machine learning and club-ready electronics. Drawing from his work with artists across genres, he introduces participants to a hands-on toolkit of contemporary techniques; from utilizing self-trained neural audio AI models to deep-diving into his experimental approach with Ableton Live, modular synthesis and smartphone samplers. The session bridges experimental electronic music with practical production workflows. Whether you’re just starting out or already deep in the rabbit hole, you’ll leave with new perspectives and tools to push your sound further.

Jesslyn Juniata is a Jakarta-based musician, songwriter, and producer whose work blends technology, spirituality, and personal expression. Through her solo project Lotus from Jakarta, ambient duo Jeslla, and collaborations across Asia and Europe, she explores themes of futurism, humanity, and healing. She is a Goethe Talents 2019 alumna and former APAC Product Specialist at Arturia, a synthesizer company from France.

She founded Belajar Synth on 2024, an open learning platform for synthesizers and music production, welcoming everyone from complete beginners to experienced artists, especially Indonesian. Built on the belief that sound exploration shouldn’t be limited by access to expensive tools, Belajar Synth aims to make learning more inclusive and approachable. In this workshop, Jesslyn will lead a Belajar Synth session alongside a special guest, Berlin-based teacher and producer, Björn.

Se slideshow på Instagram
item.content:encoded:
🖼️ Slideshow (3 medier)

@97kobo.lab

Saturday 11.04.2026 13:00-16:00 @97kobo.lab
Bring your laptop + ableton live
REGISTRATION LINK IN BIO or DM/WA: 0851-7158-8508

In this workshop, berlin-based musician, producer, sound designer and university lecturer, Björn Tillmann (BAERK.), shares his personal approach to sound design: an exploration of the boundaries between organic texture, machine learning and club-ready electronics. Drawing from his work with artists across genres, he introduces participants to a hands-on toolkit of contemporary techniques; from utilizing self-trained neural audio AI models to deep-diving into his experimental approach with Ableton Live, modular synthesis and smartphone samplers. The session bridges experimental electronic music with practical production workflows. Whether you’re just starting out or already deep in the rabbit hole, you’ll leave with new perspectives and tools to push your sound further.

Jesslyn Juniata is a Jakarta-based musician, songwriter, and producer whose work blends technology, spirituality, and personal expression. Through her solo project Lotus from Jakarta, ambient duo Jeslla, and collaborations across Asia and Europe, she explores themes of futurism, humanity, and healing. She is a Goethe Talents 2019 alumna and former APAC Product Specialist at Arturia, a synthesizer company from France.

She founded Belajar Synth on 2024, an open learning platform for synthesizers and music production, welcoming everyone from complete beginners to experienced artists, especially Indonesian. Built on the belief that sound exploration shouldn’t be limited by access to expensive tools, Belajar Synth aims to make learning more inclusive and approachable. In this workshop, Jesslyn will lead a Belajar Synth session alongside a special guest, Berlin-based teacher and producer, Björn.

Se slideshow på Instagram

item.title: Algorapture: Silent Iteration /dev/null experimental live coding audio/visual se...
item.description:
🖼️ Slideshow (8 medier)

@97kobo.lab

Algorapture: Silent Iteration /dev/null

experimental live coding audio/visual session
real-time code, evolving structures, no fixed outcome

featuring:
ali aza
welderahmat
gectheory
luna
miffy
rmpgng slrymn

🗓 SAT, 04.04.26
🕖 19:00 – 22:00
📍 97kobo.lab, blok m

min 50k donation
rsvp / walk-in

Se slideshow på Instagram
